scene_input.scene_summary: The Prophet greets Abū Mulayḥ and Qārib ibn al-Aswad warmly and invites them to sit with him.
scene_input.key_visual_action: The Prophet extending his hand in a gesture of welcome.

schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 349

characters.name: The Prophet
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, one hand extended in a gentle reassuring gesture

characters.name: Abū Mulayḥ
characters.appearance: medium build, wearing a simple off-white thobe and plain brown woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering

characters.name: Qārib ibn al-Aswad
characters.appearance: slender build, wearing a simple off-white thobe and plain brown woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering

schema_output.narrative_text: The Prophet Muhammad welcomed his guests, Abū Mulayḥ and Qārib ibn al-Aswad, with kindness and warmth.

compliance.notes: All characters are properly dressed and no modern objects are present.

schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. Interior of a modest 7th century Medina home with unpainted mud-brick walls in warm earth tones and a packed-earth floor partly covered by a woven palm-fiber mat. Late afternoon golden sunlight streams through an open wooden doorway on the right, casting warm rays across the room. In the corner sits a tall clay water jug, and a small ceramic oil lamp rests on a low wooden shelf giving a soft glow. Three figures sit facing each other on the mat. On the left, the central figure seen entirely from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, one hand extended in a gentle reassuring gesture. On the right, two figures sit with their faces turned towards the central figure: Abū Mulayḥ, a medium build man wearing a simple off-white thobe and plain brown woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering, and Qārib ibn al-Aswad, a slender build man wearing a simple off-white thobe and plain brown woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering. Soft warm golden light, intimate and welcoming mood. Medium close shot at eye level. Warm sand, cream, and golden palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
